review_snippets.title: How to Run Google Workspace Access Reviews: 8 Tools in 2026
review_snippets.content:
Pros:

 Authorization graph technology reveals effective permissions beyond assigned roles
 Discovers service accounts and OAuth applications with Google Workspace access
 Risk-based prioritization helps reviewers focus on highest-risk access first

Cons:

 Enterprise-focused pricing without transparent costs or free trial options
 ServiceNow acquisition in late 2024 creates uncertainty about future product direction
 Limited public reviews make it difficult to evaluate user satisfaction at scal

review_snippets.content: Detailed Description of Impact On Thursday, 8 August 2024 from 12:06 to 16:16 US/Pacific, Gmail and Google Drive experienced service degradation for a duration of 4 hours and 10 minutes. Gmail Affected users experienced issues with attachment functionality wherein they were unable to send emails or save drafts containing attachments. There was no impact to emails sent without attachments. Google Drive Affected users may have observed degraded performance while performing upload operations. | [..

review_snippets.title: Highlights from 2024: Google Workspace Update Recap
review_snippets.content: Over the course of the year, Gmail received multiple ✨ Gemini ✨ updates to help streamline email-related tasks and workflows. In August, Gemini’s assistive writing feature, “Help me write”, was improved with the addition of the 💅 “Polish” function, which converts rough drafts into fully-realised emails. New web and mobile shortcuts were also added for quick access to all of the “Help me write” functions, such as 👔 “Formalize”, 📜 “Elaborate” and ✂ “Shorten”. “Help me write” also became available

Google Workspace is the super app for controlling work infrastructure

Google Workspace is an absolute pleasure to use for any cloud tasks, whether it be mailing, calendar, slides, or more. What makes it better is collaborating with my team and managing every activity as well. It essentially gives complete organizational control to the admins while using every Google App.

# Google Workspace Reviews & Ratings

### Google Workspace Video Reviews

youtubeVideoId

“My honest review of Google Workspace” [...] 4.2/5

“Great Email & Coloration tools”

we are using Google workspace for our group for over 5 years now since it was G Suite. I would say one of the best Email solutions available for corporations. for coloration as well Google Drive, Google Sheets & Doc are best option for team to work together.

Pros :  Email security is best in class & with new functionality added to Google Workspace admin panel, it keeps evolving. Very light in functionality which easy of use.

Cons :  Due to past users experience with Microsoft products it is difficult to migrate users from MS products to Google workspace. Product with similar functionality of Outlook is missing in portfolio which i believe major challenge.

Features

5/5

[Google Workspace Status Dashboard - Incidents]: Detailed Description of Impact On Thursday, 8 August 2024 from 12:06 to 16:16 US/Pacific, Gmail and Google Drive experienced service degradation for a duration of 4 hours and 10 minutes. Gmail Affected users experienced issues with attachment functionality wherein they were unable to send emails or save drafts containing attachments. There was no impact to emails sent without attachments. Google Drive Affected users may have observed degraded performance while performing upload operations. | [...] |  | Aug 9, 2024 | 12:11 AM UTC | Summary: Gmail experienced service degradation  Description: The recent fix implemented by our engineering teams has been successful in fully resolving the issue. We will be publishing a Preliminary Incident Report(IR) shortly which will provide additional details on root cause. | [...] Summary:
Gmail is experiencing service degradation

Description:
We continue to see a reduction in observed error rates based on the most recent fix our engineering teams have made. We are continuing to monitor the overall performance and stability of the Workspace impacted products and will provide more information by Thursday, 2024-08-08 18:00 US/Pacific.

We appreciate your patience as we continue our efforts to restore full service.

Customer Symptoms:
Gmail is experiencing issues with attachment functionality. Users may be unable to send emails or save drafts containing attachments. Sending emails without attachments remains functional. Receiving emails with attachments remains unaffected.

Workaround:
None at this time.

Summary:
Gmail is experiencing service degradation
